summary: Reject --cancel-on-timeout without --watch under --priority emergency in validateNotifyOptions.
reason: The cancel-on-timeout path only fires from inside the watchEmergencyReceipt poll loop. The non-emergency branch already rejected --cancel-on-timeout (it routed through the catch-all emergency-only flags check), but the emergency branch had no guard for cancelOnTimeout-without-watch: the flag was silently accepted, the cancellation never fired, and an emergency retry chain kept paging the recipient while the user believed it was cancelled.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli -run TestValidateNotifyEmergencyOptions -count=1 covers the rejection (emergency + cancel-on-timeout - watch) and the still-accepted shape (emergency + cancel-on-timeout + watch).
